system.description:
At 14th level, when you are reduced to 0 hit points or when you die, you can choose to instead collapse into a cloud of cinders that occupies your space. You become incorporeal and untargetable until the start of your next turn. At the start of your next turn, you reform in a space within 30 feet and regain hit points equal to twice your sorcerer level.

Once you use this feature, you can’t use it again until you finish a long rest.

In addition, your @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.I55ioxwbYkPRXtcd]{Ashblood Legacy} grants a unique effect during your rebirth.

Legacy of the Pyreborn

When you use Ashen Rebirth, each ally within 30 feet of your reformation also gains temporary hit points equal to your Charisma modifier + sorcerer level, and they gain advantage on their next saving throw before the end of their next turn.

Legacy of the Phoenix

When you use Ashen Rebirth, each creature of your choice within 60 feet of your new form takes fire damage equal to twice your sorcerer level if they fail a Dexterity Saving Throw (Spell save DC) or half on a success.

Legacy of the Ash Genie

All hostile creatures within 60ft of your new form become Ashbranded until the end of your next turn. The next time you or an ally deals damage to each of them, that damage is increased by 1d6 fire damage, and the creature has disadvantage on its next saving throw.
